findings.title: remoteId persisted then AbortError terminally fails task
findings.evidence: fallback-adapter-routes abort paths after remoteId persistence can reach failTask IMAGE_GENERATION_ERROR
findings.impact: refresh/unmount abort after provider accepted may lose resumability

findings.title: retryAttempt not included in default image idempotency key
findings.evidence: createCreativeImageTaskIdempotencyKey supports retryAttempt but execute defaults do not pass it
findings.impact: fresh retry may dedupe to old backend task

findings.title: canvas cache-readiness path lacks slow-content retry
findings.evidence: generated-media-cache single rehydrate attempt vs RetryImage bounded retries
findings.impact: completed provider with delayed content can recover in previews but fail canvas/insert readiness

findings.title: storage sync path bypasses retry attempt late-write guards
findings.evidence: syncTaskFromStorage merges storageTask fields without retryAttempt/startedAt guard
findings.impact: old attempt storage sync can overwrite new retry remoteId/result

findings.title: refresh recovery revives remote video tasks without restarting polling
findings.evidence: useTaskStorage flips failed video remote task to processing; useTaskExecutor excludes video remote resume in inspected path
findings.impact: failed video remote task may remain processing after refresh

findings.title: dirty worktree provenance not release-ready
findings.evidence: new2fly/opentu/new-api all have large uncommitted/untracked changes; Docker embeds current dist
findings.impact: cannot prove remote branch/image equals audited candidate

findings.title: release gate passes dirty tree because it is artifact-only
findings.evidence: creative_release_gate.py checks artifact/hash/text/go tests but not clean worktree/provenance
findings.impact: can be mistaken for full release readiness

findings.title: latest dirty candidate lacks staging/prod deployment evidence
findings.evidence: docs still mark final dynamic audit pending; production not deployed; latest candidate only locally gated
findings.impact: cannot call latest current worktree staging/prod ready
